title: I Hear You
author: Michael Sorensen
subline: The surprisingly simple skill behind better relationships.
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A stylized ear (concentric arcs opening right) on the left. Three sound waves traveling from the right edge toward the ear. The closest wave is RED. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1700)" fill="none">
    <!-- Ear shape (concentric arcs facing right) -->
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2" fill="none">
      <path d="M -400 -200 Q -200 -200 -100 -100 Q 0 0 -100 100 Q -200 200 -400 200"/>
      <path d="M -460 -160 Q -300 -160 -220 -80 Q -160 0 -220 80 Q -300 160 -460 160"/>
      <path d="M -520 -120 Q -400 -120 -340 -60 Q -300 0 -340 60 Q -400 120 -520 120"/>
      <path d="M -580 -80 Q -500 -80 -460 -40 Q -440 0 -460 40 Q -500 80 -580 80"/>
    </g>
    <!-- Sound waves traveling left -->
    <g stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round">
      <path d="M 600 -100 Q 400 0 200 -50" stroke="#4c4c4c"/>
      <path d="M 500 0 Q 300 0 150 -20" stroke="#4c4c4c"/>
      <path d="M 500 100 Q 300 100 200 80" stroke="#4c4c4c"/>
    </g>
    <!-- The closest red wave -->
    <path d="M 600 0 Q 500 0 460 0" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="4"/>
    <circle cx="600" cy="0" r="8" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Caption -->
    <text x="0" y="380" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.4em">WHAT IT FEELS LIKE TO BE HEARD</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A stylized ear (concentric ash arcs facing right) on the left, three sound waves coming from the right — two graphite, one red closest to the ear. The red wave is the moment the message lands. The composition reads as: someone talking, you hearing, the validation made visible. Title 360px italic whisper, two lines.
